    1. TransmittedPlayer(double, double, double, double, String, double, double, Team)

Class TransmittedPlayer

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Entity
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.TransmittedPlayer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class TransmittedPlayer extends Entity
The TransmittedPlayer class represents a special version of the player used for multiplayer synchronization.

This entity is invisible, non-movable, and immune to collisions. It is added to the game automatically upon creation of the player.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • TransmittedPlayer

      public TransmittedPlayer(double x, double y, double width, double height, String texture, double health, double speed, Team team)
      Constructs a new TransmittedPlayer with the specified properties.

      The TransmittedPlayer is configured to: - Be invisible (drawer.setVisible(false)). - Have collision immunity enabled. - Be non-movable. - Have no pushing power. - Not interact with blocks for collisions. After creation, it is automatically added to the game.

      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the transmitted player.
      y - the y-coordinate of the transmitted player.
      width - the width of the entity.
      height - the height of the entity.
      texture - the texture identifier.
      health - the starting health value.
      speed - the movement speed (though this entity does not move).
      team - the team to which this entity belongs.
